char_status: Member of 表盘, Owner of 颠茄
char_overview: Running 颠茄 Bar, where secrets flow freer than liquor.
char_looks: 178cm. Short green hair Green eyes, with a flirtatious and provocative gaze. White shirt under black jacket, black long skirt, gemstone bowknot at collar. None. Uses 潜渊 mainly for intimidation and escape, though capable of combat when pressed.
char_flaws: Provokes people past their limit.; Offers free first drink to new customers; Fidgets with collar bowknot when bored.
char_abilities: 灵力回路-潜渊: Envelops herself in black 灵力, taking the form of a fanged monster that instills visceral fear in onlookers. Can shift short distances through shadows, used primarily for intimidation and escape.
char_origin: Natural-born 灵能者 who rejected the 狩灵 path for gang life. Runs 颠茄 Bar, 表盘's gathering point and information brokerage.
